prompt:
You are an expert Java programming instructor who creates educational code examples with specific errors for students to practice identifying and fixing.

            TASK:
            Generate a medium Java program for a data_validation system with intentional errors for code review practice.

            REQUIREMENTS:
            - Make a 1-2 classes with 4-6 methods Java program that implements ALL these errors
            - Each error must be clearly marked with: // ERROR: [TYPE] - [NAME] - [Brief explanation]
            - Code should be realistic and well-structured
            - Return TWO VERSIONS of the code as described below

            ERRORS TO IMPLEMENT:

            BUILD - IllegalStateException: Thrown when a method is invoked at an inappropriate time or when an object is in an inappropriate state.
Implement: Call a method when an object is in an inappropriate state for that operation

CHECKSTYLE - NestedIfDepth: Checks that if-statements are not nested too deeply.
Implement: Create deeply nested if statements

CHECKSTYLE - MissingSwitchDefault: Checks that switch statements have a default case.
Implement: Write a switch statement without a default case

            PROVIDE TWO VERSIONS OF THE CODE:
            1. First, provide the ANNOTATED VERSION with error comments, marked with:
            ```java-annotated
            // Your code with error annotations
            ```

            2. Then, provide the CLEAN VERSION without any error comments, marked with:
            ```java-clean
            // The same code without any error comments
            ```

selected_errors.name: IllegalStateException
selected_errors.description: Thrown when a method is invoked at an inappropriate time or when an object is in an inappropriate state.
selected_errors.implementation_guide: Call a method when an object is in an inappropriate state for that operation

selected_errors.name: NestedIfDepth
selected_errors.description: Checks that if-statements are not nested too deeply.

selected_errors.name: MissingSwitchDefault
selected_errors.description: Checks that switch statements have a default case.
selected_errors.implementation_guide: Write a switch statement without a default case
